note: Coverage claims for the honesty gate. One entry per capability in machine/canon/registry.json. deepestRouteChecked must be a real path one level past entryRoute.

entries.worstFinding: Canon registry is draft with a single capability, so honesty-gate coverage cannot yet be exhaustive; audit cadence (Spec 2) is not wired, so audits still run on-demand rather than on a regular trigger.
